articles.body:
In recent years, water bottles have become more than just a way to stay hydrated; they have become a fashion statement. Two brands, Owala and Stanley, have emerged as the frontrunners in this trend, with their bottles being spotted everywhere from school campuses to hiking trails.

Owala bottles are known for their vibrant colors and unique designs. They come in a variety of sizes, from small tumblers to large gallon jugs, and feature a patented "FreeSip" spout that allows users to sip or swig their beverage. The bottles are also double-walled and vacuum-insulated, keeping drinks cold for up to 24 hours and hot for up to 12 hours.

Stanley bottles, on the other hand, have a more classic and retro design. They are made of stainless steel and come in a range of colors, including the popular Quencher, which has gained a cult following. Like Owala, Stanley bottles are also insulated, keeping drinks cold for up to 7 hours and hot for up to 2 hours.

Both brands have gained a loyal following, with many students and adults alike showing off their bottles on social media. The Owala vs. Stanley debate has even sparked friendly competitions, with people comparing their bottles' performance and style.

"I prefer Owala because of its variety of colors and the FreeSip feature," said Emily Chen, a junior. "It's also easier to clean."

However, others are drawn to the Stanley's classic design and durability. "I've had my Stanley for years, and it's still in great condition," said David Lee, a senior. "It's a timeless piece that never goes out of style."

Ultimately, the choice between Owala and Stanley comes down to personal preference. Both brands offer high-quality water bottles that are both functional and stylish, making them a popular choice for anyone looking to stay hydrated on the go.

articles.title: Lincoln HS Blood Donation Campaign: Raising Awareness
articles.author: Katharine Jimenez
articles.dek: The annual blood donation campaign at Lincoln High School is more than just a way to save lives; it's a communityâ¦
articles.body:
The annual blood donation campaign at Lincoln High School is more than just a way to save lives; it's a community effort that brings students together to support a vital cause. This year's campaign, organized by the student government, aims to raise awareness about the importance of blood donation and encourage more students to participate.

The campaign, which takes place every year, is a testament to the school's commitment to community service. Students who are eligible to donate blood are encouraged to do so, and those who are not eligible are invited to volunteer their time and help with the organization of the event.

"We want to make sure that everyone understands the impact that blood donation can have," said Mr. Harrison, the student government advisor. "A single donation can save up to three lives, and it's a simple yet powerful way to make a difference."

The campaign has been met with enthusiasm from students, with many expressing their willingness to contribute. "I've always wanted to donate blood, but I was a little nervous," said Sarah Lee, a junior. "But knowing that it's for a good cause and that I'll be helping others makes me feel more confident."

The school is also partnering with local blood banks to ensure that the donated blood is used effectively. The collected blood will be distributed to hospitals and medical centers in the area, where it will be used to treat patients with various medical conditions.

The blood donation campaign is a reminder that even the smallest actions can have a significant impact. By participating in this event, students at Lincoln High School are not only saving lives but also fostering a sense of community and compassion.

articles.title: Backpack Charms Do The Tiny Trend Makes A Big Statement
articles.author: Jennifer Month
articles.dek: In a world where personal expression is key, even the smallest accessories can make a big statement.
articles.body:
In a world where personal expression is key, even the smallest accessories can make a big statement. This season, backpack charms have become the latest trend, adding a touch of personality and flair to everyday bags. From quirky keychains to intricate handmade creations, these tiny trinkets are turning ordinary backpacks into fashion statements.

The trend is particularly popular among high school students, who are using backpack charms to showcase their interests, hobbies, and unique styles. Whether it's a miniature replica of a favorite food, a character from a beloved movie, or a symbolic charm representing a personal achievement, these accessories are a way for students to express themselves and connect with others who share similar tastes.

"I love my backpack charms because they let me show off my personality," said Jessica Lee, a freshman. "I have charms that represent my favorite bands, my love for animals, and even my dream of traveling the world."

The versatility of backpack charms is another reason for their popularity. They can be easily swapped out to match different outfits or moods, allowing for endless customization. This allows students to continuously update their style and keep their backpacks looking fresh and exciting.

The trend has also fostered a sense of community among students. Sharing and trading charms has become a common practice, with students often engaging in discussions about their collections and seeking out unique or rare charms. This shared interest in backpack charms has created a new way for students to bond and connect with one another.

As the trend continues to grow, it's clear that backpack charms are more than just a fleeting fad. They are a form of self-expression, a way to build connections, and a reminder that even the smallest details can make a big impact.

articles.title: The Great Debate
articles.author: Qimci Li
articles.dek: Is Homework Still Necessary?
articles.body:
In today's fast-paced academic environment, the necessity of homework has become a subject of heated debate. While some educators believe that homework is essential for reinforcing learning and developing good study habits, others argue that it places an undue burden on students, leading to stress and burnout.

One of the main arguments against homework is that it takes away valuable time that could be spent on other activities, such as sports, hobbies, or spending time with family. Students often find themselves spending hours on assignments, leaving little room for relaxation or personal pursuits. This can lead to a lack of sleep, increased stress levels, and a diminished overall well-being.

Furthermore, some argue that homework does not always translate into improved academic performance. In many cases, students may rush through assignments or copy answers from peers, defeating the purpose of the exercise. This raises questions about the effectiveness of homework as a learning tool and whether it truly contributes to a deeper understanding of the subject matter.

On the other hand, proponents of homework argue that it is crucial for reinforcing classroom learning and developing essential skills such as time management, responsibility, and problem-solving. They believe that homework provides students with an opportunity to practice what they have learned, identify areas where they need further help, and develop the discipline necessary for academic success.

The debate over homework is complex, with valid arguments on both sides. It is important for educators to consider the potential downsides of assigning excessive homework and to find a balance that promotes learning without compromising students' well-being. Perhaps a more tailored approach to homework, focusing on quality over quantity, would be more beneficial for students.

articles.title: Trump's War on Immigrants is a War on All Americans
articles.author: Rebecca Medrano
articles.dek: The current administration's immigration policies have sparked widespread controversy, with critics arguing that theyâ¦
articles.body:
The current administration's immigration policies have sparked widespread controversy, with critics arguing that they are not only inhumane but also detrimental to the nation's economy and social fabric. The separation of families at the border, the detention of asylum seekers, and the rhetoric surrounding immigrants have all contributed to a climate of fear and division.

These policies not only violate basic human rights but also undermine the very principles on which the United States was founded. The idea of a nation built by immigrants, offering refuge and opportunity, seems to be a distant memory as the country grapples with its approach to immigration.

Economically, immigrants play a vital role in the workforce, filling essential jobs and contributing to the tax base. Restricting immigration not only harms the economy but also deprives the nation of the diverse talents and perspectives that immigrants bring. The fear-mongering and scapegoating of immigrants as criminals or threats only serve to distract from the real issues and create a climate of prejudice.

The impact of these policies extends beyond the immediate individuals affected. They create a society that is less compassionate, less diverse, and ultimately, less American. It is crucial for us to re-evaluate our approach to immigration and embrace policies that are rooted in empathy, justice, and a recognition of the valuable contributions that immigrants make to our society.

articles.title: The Politics of the Epstein Files
articles.author: Rebecca Medrano
articles.dek: The recent unsealing of documents related to Jeffrey Epstein's sex trafficking ring has sent shockwaves across theâ¦
articles.body:
The recent unsealing of documents related to Jeffrey Epstein's sex trafficking ring has sent shockwaves across the nation, exposing a web of powerful individuals allegedly involved in his crimes. While the full extent of the scandal is still unfolding, the released files offer a disturbing glimpse into a world of exploitation and potential cover-ups.

The documents contain allegations against a wide range of prominent figures, including politicians, celebrities, and business leaders. While many of these individuals have denied any wrongdoing, the sheer volume of accusations has raised serious questions about accountability and the pervasiveness of such crimes within elite circles.

The Epstein case highlights a critical issue: the role of powerful individuals in facilitating and perpetuating abuse. The alleged involvement of high-profile figures suggests a systemic problem that requires a thorough investigation and a commitment to justice for the victims. The ongoing revelations serve as a stark reminder that no one is above the law, regardless of their status or influence.

It is imperative that these allegations are investigated thoroughly and impartially, ensuring that all those involved are held accountable for their actions. The pursuit of justice for the victims must remain the top priority, and the unsealing of these documents is a crucial step in that process. The public deserves to know the truth, and those responsible must face the consequences.

articles.title: The Truth of Thanksgiving
articles.author: Miranda Garcia
articles.dek: Thanksgiving, a holiday traditionally associated with gratitude and feasting, often overlooks its complex historical origins.
articles.body:
Thanksgiving, a holiday traditionally associated with gratitude and feasting, often overlooks its complex historical origins. While many celebrate it as a time to gather with loved ones and reflect on blessings, it's important to acknowledge the darker aspects of its history, particularly the narrative surrounding the Pilgrims and Native Americans.

The commonly told story of the first Thanksgiving in 1621, where Pilgrims and Wampanoag people shared a meal, is often romanticized. While it is true that a harvest feast did occur, it's crucial to understand the context. The Wampanoag people had their own traditions and ceremonies long before the Pilgrims arrived. The historical accounts suggest that the feast was a complex interaction, not simply a harmonious sharing between cultures.

Furthermore, the subsequent history of European colonization led to immense suffering, displacement, and violence against Native American populations. Ignoring this reality while celebrating Thanksgiving risks perpetuating a narrative that erases the pain and struggles of Indigenous peoples. Many Native Americans view Thanksgiving not as a celebration but as a National Day of Mourning, a somber reminder of the injustices they have faced.

As we approach Thanksgiving, it's an opportunity to broaden our understanding and practice gratitude in a more inclusive way. This can involve learning more about the history of Indigenous peoples, supporting Indigenous communities, and reflecting on our own blessings with a mindful awareness of the broader historical context. True gratitude involves acknowledging all aspects of history, both the joyful and the painful, and striving for a more just and equitable future for everyone.

articles.title: Cross Country Season Ends on a High Note
articles.author: Alma Santiago
articles.dek: The Lincoln High School cross country team concluded their 2025-2026 season with a commendable performance at the league finals.
articles.body:
The Lincoln High School cross country team concluded their 2025-2026 season with a commendable performance at the league finals. The team, which had a mix of seasoned veterans and promising newcomers, showed remarkable dedication and improvement throughout the year.

The boys' team secured a third-place finish overall, with several runners achieving personal bests. Senior captain, Carlos Hernandez, led the charge, finishing second in the boys' 5K race. His strong performance was a testament to his years of hard work and commitment to the sport.

The girls' team also had a successful season, placing fourth in the league. Isabella Rangel, a junior, emerged as a standout performer, consistently placing in the top five in her races. Her dedication and leadership were instrumental in motivating her teammates.

Coach Sanchez expressed pride in the team's achievements, highlighting their resilience and sportsmanship. "I'm incredibly proud of how far these athletes have come," he said. "They've pushed their limits, supported each other, and represented our school with honor. This season has been a testament to their hard work and passion for running."

The team's success is not just measured in wins and losses, but in the personal growth and development of each athlete. The lessons learned on the cross country courseâperseverance, teamwork, and the pursuit of excellenceâwill undoubtedly serve them well in their future endeavors.

articles.title: Basketball PreSeason: Big Wins For the Boys Team Signal Great Year to Come
articles.author: Audrie Ozuna
articles.dek: The Lincoln High School boys' basketball team has kicked off their preseason with a series of dominant victories, signaling a promising season ahead.
articles.body:
The Lincoln High School boys' basketball team has kicked off their preseason with a series of dominant victories, signaling a promising season ahead. The team, led by a talented roster of returning players and promising new additions, has shown impressive chemistry and skill on the court.

In their recent games, the boys have showcased a strong offensive attack, with players consistently scoring in double digits. The team's defense has also been a formidable force, shutting down opponents and creating turnovers. This balanced performance has resulted in decisive wins, leaving fans excited for what's to come.

"We've been working hard in practice, focusing on our teamwork and execution," said senior captain, Michael Chen. "We're confident in our abilities, and we're ready to compete at a high level."

The team's success is attributed to the rigorous training regimen and the strong bond among the players. The coaching staff has implemented a strategic approach, emphasizing both individual skill development and cohesive team play. This has resulted in a well-rounded team that is prepared to face any challenge.

With the regular season approaching, the Lincoln High School boys' basketball team is poised to make a significant impact. Their preseason performance has set a high bar, and the team is determined to continue their winning streak and bring home a championship title.

articles.title: Despite Pain, Girls Soccer Team Ready for Action
articles.author: Jonathan Mendoza
articles.dek: The Lincoln High School girls' soccer team is gearing up for what promises to be a challenging yet exciting season.
articles.body:
The Lincoln High School girls' soccer team is gearing up for what promises to be a challenging yet exciting season. Despite facing a few setbacks due to injuries, the team remains optimistic and determined to achieve success on the field.

The team's resilience has been evident in their preseason training. While some key players are still recovering from injuries, the remaining team members have stepped up, showcasing their dedication and skill. The coaches have been working closely with the injured players, ensuring their proper recovery while also developing contingency plans to maintain team performance.

"Injuries are a part of the game, but they don't define us," said senior captain, Sarah Kim. "We have a strong team bond, and we'll support each other through thick and thin. We're all eager to get back on the field and give it our best shot."

The team's offensive and defensive strategies have been refined during preseason practices, with a focus on improving coordination and communication. The coaching staff is confident that the team's determination and skill will enable them to overcome any obstacles they may face.

As the season begins, the girls' soccer team is ready to embrace the challenges ahead. Their commitment to the sport, combined with their unwavering team spirit, positions them for a successful and memorable season.

As the holiday season approaches, the spirit of Christmas fills the air, and what better way to embrace it than through music? Lincoln High School students have chimed in, sharing their top 5 holiday songs that are sure to bring cheer and festive vibes. From classic carols to modern pop hits, these songs capture the essence of the season and have become essential listening for many.

The survey, conducted among students, revealed a diverse range of preferences, reflecting the broad appeal of Christmas music. Whether it's the nostalgic melodies of traditional songs or the upbeat rhythms of contemporary hits, there's a holiday tune for everyone to enjoy.

articles.title: Best Christmas Movies or Shows to Watch
articles.author: Samantha Scott
articles.dek: The holiday season is synonymous with cozy nights, warm drinks, and, of course, festive movies and shows.
articles.body:
The holiday season is synonymous with cozy nights, warm drinks, and, of course, festive movies and shows. As families and friends gather to celebrate, the question of what to watch often arises. From timeless classics to modern favorites, there's a plethora of options to choose from that are sure to bring joy and holiday cheer.

When looking for the perfect Christmas movie or show, it's important to consider what kind of experience you're seeking. Do you want a heartwarming story that tugs at your heartstrings? A hilarious comedy that will have you rolling with laughter? Or perhaps an animated adventure that the whole family can enjoy?

Based on popular opinion and critical acclaim, here are some highly recommended Christmas movies and shows that are sure to make your holiday season even brighter:

For those who love heartwarming tales, "It's a Wonderful Life" remains a perennial favorite, reminding us of the importance of community and the impact of our actions. "Miracle on 34th Street" offers a magical story about believing in the impossible, while "A Charlie Brown Christmas" provides a timeless message about the true meaning of the holiday.

If you're in the mood for laughs, "Elf" is a modern classic that never fails to entertain with its quirky humor and endearing characters. "Home Alone" offers slapstick comedy and a heartwarming story of a child's ingenuity. For those who enjoy animated films, "The Nightmare Before Christmas" offers a unique blend of spooky and festive, while "Frosty the Snowman" is a charming tale for all ages.

These movies and shows, each with its unique appeal, offer a delightful way to embrace the spirit of Christmas and create lasting memories with loved ones. So, grab some popcorn, cozy up, and let the holiday magic unfold on your screen.

articles.title: Unique Holiday Celebrations
articles.author: Aaron Ortiz
articles.dek: As the holiday season unfolds, people around the world find unique ways to celebrate and create lasting memories.
articles.body:
As the holiday season unfolds, people around the world find unique ways to celebrate and create lasting memories. From festive gatherings to cultural traditions, the spirit of togetherness and joy takes center stage. This year, many at Lincoln High School have embraced innovative approaches to holiday celebrations, blending personal traditions with community events.

One popular way students are celebrating is by hosting themed parties, where guests are encouraged to dress up according to a specific holiday motif. These parties often feature curated playlists, festive decorations, and a variety of seasonal treats, creating an immersive and engaging experience.

Another trend gaining momentum is the focus on experiential celebrations. Instead of material gifts, many are opting for activities that foster connection and create shared memories. This includes weekend getaways, concert outings, or even volunteering together for a charitable cause. These experiences not only bring people closer but also contribute to a more meaningful holiday season.

In addition to personal celebrations, community events play a vital role in spreading holiday cheer. Local organizations and businesses often host festive gatherings, tree-lighting ceremonies, and holiday markets, bringing people together to share in the joy of the season. These events provide opportunities for residents to connect, support local artisans, and experience the vibrant spirit of their community.

The holiday season is a time for reflection, gratitude, and connection. By embracing unique celebrations and fostering a sense of togetherness, we can make this time of year truly special for everyone.

With the holiday season in full swing, Christmas music fills the air everywhere: streaming through stores, playing on the radio, and echoing through the halls of Lincoln High School. As students and staff prepare for the upcoming break, the question on everyone's mind is, 'What is Lincoln students' all-time favorite holiday song?' 1st Place: "All I Want for Christmas Is You" by Mariah Carey

2nd Place: "Last Christmas" by Wham!

The results are in, and the top 5 songs are clearly popular among Lincoln's students, showing a diversity of musical taste for the season. Almost half of the students responded with "none," "nothing," or indicated they don't listen to Christmas music at all. However, 25 students said they do enjoy listening to Christmas music. "I love Christmas music," said senior, Ashley Evans. "It helps me get into the holiday spirit."

As the holiday season approaches, many people have different celebrations. The first celebrated event for many students is Thanksgiving, followed by the tradition of Christmas gift-giving, and then the New Year. Students are excited to have a break from school to relax and spend time with family and friends. The holiday season is a time for joy, love, and happiness. Many students are looking forward to spending time with their loved ones, decorating their homes, and participating in holiday traditions.

articles.title: The History Behind Some of Christmas's Most Beloved Traditions
articles.author: David Lin and Jachym Taussig
articles.dek: Many things come to mind when you think of Christmas: stockings, elves, presents, and most importantly, Christmas trees.
articles.body:
Many things come to mind when you think of Christmas: stockings, elves, presents, and most importantly, Christmas trees. These items may be wonder where they came from, but they do have a rich history.

Let's start with Christmas stockings. They were believed to originate from Saint Nicholas, who was a generous man who would help the poor. He was known to help out three poor sisters. Caroling came to be back in the 13th century. People would go door-to-door and sing songs for people.

Bringing a houseguest to your home is well wishes. According to tradition, people would invite guests into their homes and give them presents to eat. According to tradition, people would give guests presents to eat. According to tradition, people would give guests presents to eat. According to tradition, people would give guests presents to eat. According to tradition, people would give guests presents to eat.

The tradition of hanging stockings by the fireplace goes back to a legend that Saint Nicholas, a bishop known for his generosity, had tossed three bags of gold coins down a poor man's chimney. The coins landed in his daughters' stockings, which were drying by the fireplace.

When it comes to Christmas candy canes, they come from all enjoy. Like the candy cane story, Christmas candy canes also come from Germany. History co-related the candy cane with a shepherd's staff. The candy cane also has a story to tell. A pastor in Indiana in the 1800s gave his choir boys straight sticks that were shaped like a "J" to represent Jesus.

In honor of the occasion of Christmas, Kevin Nim, another student, shares his story of how he likes to celebrate the holidays. "My favorite part of Christmas is spending time with my family and friends and seeing their reactions when they get their gifts." When asked about his favorite Christmas tradition, Nim said, "My favorite tradition is decorating the Christmas tree with my family. We always have a lot of fun doing it."

With everything that makes up its history, Christmas, today, is still a time for family, friends, and celebration. It is a time for joy, love, and caroling. It is also the time to spend time with your family and friends and have a good time.

The fall play is finally here and it's an absolute delight. Lincoln theater has kicked off its 2025-2026 season with a production of George S. Kaufman and Moss Hart's "The Man Who Came to Dinner." The play, directed by M.S. Middleton, and his cast have truly given their all.

The show is centered around critic and radio personality Sheridan Whiteside (played by Ricardo Beltran), who after an unfortunate turn of events, ends up injured and homeless. He is taken in by the Stanley family, whose lives are turned upside down by his presence. The entire premise is absurd and utterly unpredictable, and it is absolutely hilarious. Whiteside's obnoxious and makes it everyone's problem. The entire premise is absurd and utterly unpredictable, and it is absolutely hilarious. Whiteside's obnoxious and makes it everyone's problem.

The cast is outstanding, and each member of the ensemble is excellent. Standout performers include Emmalyn Soma as a hysterical rendition of Banjo, Stephanie Ramirez as Lorraine Sheldon, Samantha Rattay as Maggie Cutler, and of course, Ricardo Beltran as Mr. Whiteside. The crew's hard work that this play is such a joy to watch.

articles.title: Reasons Your New Year's Resolutions Work (and Same, They Don't)
articles.author: Elliami Gabriel
articles.dek: All around the world, on December 31, people come together to annually celebrate the passing of the old year and the beginning of the new.
articles.body:
All around the world, on December 31, people come together to annually celebrate the passing of the old year and the beginning of the new. What better way to ring in the new year than with a new set of resolutions? What better time to start fresh and new than at the beginning of the year?

For a week or two, things appear to get off to a grand start; gyms are nearly empty on the first day, but slowly fill up. Walking into a gym for the first time, I am nervous, as I have never been. But once I am inside, I notice that the atmosphere is one of welcome and encouragement. As I walk toward the machines, I feel a sense of purpose. Every person there is in their own world, but they are all working toward a common goal: to better themselves. It's a beautiful thing to witness.

However, the problem arises when the gym starts to fill up. Many people get discouraged and quit. They are not able to handle the pressure of being in a crowded gym. But, I, for one, am not discouraged. Instead, I am motivated. I see the people who are working hard, and I want to be like them. I want to be able to push myself to my limits and achieve my goals. I know that it is not going to be easy, but I am willing to put in the work. I am willing to make the sacrifices. I am willing to do whatever it takes to succeed.

There are many reasons why people fail their New Year's resolutions. One of the most common reasons is that they set unrealistic goals. They want to lose 30 pounds in a month, or they want to run a marathon without any prior training. When they don't achieve their goals, they get discouraged and give up. Another reason why people fail their New Year's resolutions is that they don't have a plan. They just have a vague idea of what they want to achieve, but they don't have a concrete plan of action. When they don't have a plan, they are more likely to get sidetracked and give up.

It is important to have a plan when you are setting New Year's resolutions. You need to have a clear idea of what you want to achieve, and you need to have a concrete plan of action. You also need to be realistic about your goals. You can't expect to achieve everything overnight. It is important to set achievable goals, and to celebrate your successes along the way. If you do this, you will be more likely to stick with your resolutions and achieve your goals.

articles.title: Setting a Goal
articles.author: Elsa Daily
articles.dek: Student tips to reset your year off right.
articles.body:
The new year is a time for reflection and setting new goals. For many, the new year is a chance to start fresh and make positive changes in their lives. However, it can be difficult to know where to start. This article offers tips for setting goals that will help you make the most of the new year.

The first step is to set a goal that is meaningful to you. What do you want to achieve in the new year? What are your passions and interests? Once you have a clear idea of what you want to achieve, you can start to break it down into smaller, more manageable steps. For example, if your goal is to lose weight, you can set smaller goals such as eating healthier meals or exercising more often.

It is also important to be realistic about your goals. You can't expect to achieve everything overnight. Set achievable goals and celebrate your successes along the way. This will help you to stay motivated and on track.

Another important tip is to find an accountability partner. This is someone who will help you to stay on track and motivated. This could be a friend, family member, or even a therapist. Having someone to hold you accountable can make a big difference in your success.

Finally, it is important to be patient with yourself. Change takes time, and there will be setbacks along the way. Do not get discouraged if you do not achieve your goals immediately. Keep working hard, and you will eventually get there.

articles.dek: The new year is a time for new beginnings, and many people have traditions that they follow to bring good luck in the year ahead.
articles.body:
The new year is a time for new beginnings, and many people have traditions that they follow to bring good luck in the year ahead. These traditions vary from culture to culture, but they all have one thing in common: they are meant to bring good fortune.

One popular tradition is to eat a special meal on New Year's Eve. In some cultures, this meal includes lentils, which are said to bring wealth and prosperity. In other cultures, it is customary to eat pork, which is believed to bring good luck. Some people also eat grapes, which are said to bring good luck if you eat 12 of them, one for each month of the year.

Another tradition is to wear certain colors on New Year's Eve. In some cultures, red is considered a lucky color, and people will wear red clothing to bring good luck. In other cultures, it is believed that wearing yellow will bring good luck and prosperity.

Some people also have traditions that involve making noise on New Year's Eve. This is done to scare away evil spirits and to welcome in the new year. This can include fireworks, bells, or even just shouting. Some people also believe that it is important to clean their house on New Year's Eve to get rid of any bad luck from the old year.

There are many other New Year's traditions around the world, such as opening doors and windows to let out the old year and welcome in the new, or throwing your old shoes out the window to get rid of bad luck. Whatever your traditions may be, the new year is a time for hope and new beginnings. It is a time to reflect on the past year and to look forward to the year ahead. It is a time to make resolutions and to set goals for yourself. It is a time to celebrate life and to enjoy the company of loved ones. articles.title: "Fake News," Bias, and Misinformation - How are you getting your news?
articles.author: Rebecca Medrano
articles.dek: In today's world, it's easy to get caught up in the cycle of "fake news," bias, and misinformation.
articles.body:
In today's world, it's easy to get caught up in the cycle of "fake news," bias, and misinformation. With so much information available at our fingertips, it's hard to know what to believe. We are constantly bombarded with news from various sources, and it's easy to get swept up in the tide of sensationalism and biased reporting. It's important to be aware of the different types of misinformation and to develop critical thinking skills to discern truth from falsehood.

The term "fake news" refers to false or misleading information that is presented as news. It can be spread intentionally to deceive people, or it can be spread unintentionally by people who are not aware that they are sharing false information. Fake news can take many forms, including fabricated stories, manipulated images, and deceptive headlines. It can also be spread through social media, email, and other online platforms.

Bias is another common problem in the media. Bias is a tendency to favor one point of view over another. It can be conscious or unconscious. When a news source is biased, it may present information in a way that favors a particular political party, ideology, or group. This can make it difficult for readers to get a balanced and objective understanding of the issues.

Misinformation is a broader term that refers to any false or inaccurate information. It can be spread intentionally or unintentionally. Misinformation can be spread through various channels, including social media, word-of-mouth, and even traditional media outlets. It is important to be aware of the different types of misinformation and to develop critical thinking skills to discern truth from falsehood.

The media plays a crucial role in shaping public opinion. It is therefore essential for us to be critical consumers of news and to be aware of the potential for "fake news," bias, and misinformation. By developing strong critical thinking skills, we can become more informed and responsible citizens.

articles.title: The Disappearance of Nancy Guthrie
articles.author: Sophia Miranda
articles.dek: No leads, conspiracy theories abound.
articles.body:
On the night of Feb. 24, 2024, Nancy Guthrie, a mother of six, vanished from her home in Evanston, Illinois. The 44-year-old woman was last seen by her husband, David Guthrie, at approximately 10:30 p.m. as she was tucking their youngest child into bed. When he woke up the next morning, she was gone. Her car was still in the driveway, and her purse and phone were on the kitchen counter. There was no sign of forced entry, and no indications of a struggle. The only thing that was out of place was a single, muddy footprint on the living room rug, which did not match any of the family's shoes.

The disappearance of Nancy Guthrie has baffled investigators and left her family in a state of anguish. The local police department has launched a full-scale investigation, but they have yet to find any leads. The community has rallied around the Guthrie family, organizing search parties and distributing flyers with Nancy's face. However, despite their efforts, there has been no sign of her since that night.

Theories about her disappearance have ranged from foul play to voluntary departure. Some speculate that she may have been abducted, while others believe she may have chosen to leave on her own accord. The lack of evidence has only fueled these theories, leaving the family and the community in a state of uncertainty.

Adding to the mystery, there have been reports of strange occurrences in the days leading up to her disappearance. Neighbors have reported hearing unusual noises coming from the Guthrie house, and some have claimed to see flickering lights in the windows late at night. These accounts, while uncorroborated, have added a layer of intrigue to the already baffling case.

The Guthrie family has expressed their desperation for answers, pleading with the public for any information that could help them find Nancy. They have set up a website and a social media page dedicated to her case, hoping to spread awareness and solicit tips. The investigation is ongoing, and authorities are urging anyone with information to come forward.

The key spring 2026 trends will help you stand out from the crowd. From colorful clothes to retro accessories, there are plenty of ways to add some flair to your wardrobe. This season, it's all about expressing yourself and having fun with fashion.

One of the biggest trends for spring 2026 is vibrant colors. Think bright pinks, blues, and greens. These colors are sure to make a statement and add some personality to your outfits. You can also incorporate these colors into your accessories, such as bags and shoes.

Another trend that's been making a comeback is retro styles. Think 70s-inspired bell bottoms, 80s-inspired shoulder pads, and 90s-inspired grunge. These styles are all about embracing the past and having fun with fashion. You can find these styles at vintage stores or at your favorite clothing retailers.

Accessorizing is key this season. Think statement necklaces, chunky bracelets, and oversized sunglasses. These accessories will help you complete your look and add some personality to your outfits. You can also experiment with different hairstyles and makeup looks to further express yourself.

articles.body:
The third installment of director Rian Johnson's "whodunit-mystery" series - "Wake Up Dead Man" - is set to be released on Netflix. It stars Daniel Craig as Benoit Blanc, this time probing a murder mystery at a private island estate. But this time, he is not alone. He has brought along his two trusty detectives, who he has trained himself.
